_comment: Demonstrates the noise(canary)/signal(toil) track-record schema consumed by
scripts/dep-lifecycle-model.py --track. The figures are hand-authored to show
two archetypes, not observed CVE counts. Console7's REAL series starts at its
t0 (govulncheck-clean by pin => signal=0) and accrues once the OSV/vuln.go.dev
feeds are allowlisted (both are egress-policy-blocked in the dev sandbox).
Each observation: module, period (sortable), noise = NEW CVEs disclosed in the
component that period (source: OSV/GHSA), signal = of those, how many are
REACHABLE on our call path (source: govulncheck). Optional remediated_days =
time from the reachable disclosure to the fix shipping; omit it while a signal
